notes: B2B web-based sales channel and order management platform; last version was 6.2 (Web BusinessManager Suite) released April 2001; company shut down May 2001
The general product category SpaceWorks participated in; now dominated by SAP Commerce, OroCommerce, Magento Commerce, Salesforce B2B Commerce
Legacy B2B ordering technology that OrderManager was designed to complement and eventually replace for wholesale distributors
Server-side platform for hosting web storefronts; OrderManager could run in hosted CSP (Commerce Service Provider) environments
